title: _changeset.cumulative_tier — input
description: Input for the SemVer-max-over-batch tier calculation. Mirrors plugins/sulis/scripts/_changeset.py::cumulative_tier(changesets). Per ADR-003 Blue invariant: describes only the load-bearing fields, not exhaustive.

changesets.description: Parsed changeset dicts; each MAY carry a `tier` field. Items without a `tier` are ignored; empty list → null result.
